text:
Mr. Meeseeks, also known as Kirkland Meeseeks ,
is a Kirkland-brand Meeseeks that has red skin and doesn't seem to enjoy helping others.

Kirkland Meeseeks doesn't seem like he cares about fulfilling a request or helping others, unlike the blue on-brand Meeseeks. He appears disaffected and uninterested, and how well he completes jobs, or the lengths he will go to complete them, is unknown.

sources.title: Kirkland Brand Mr. Meeseeks API record
